title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 tops 65,000 for first time as oil falls on Hormuz reopening hopes
summary_full: Japan’s Nikkei 225 breached 65,000 for the first time Monday as a sharp decline in oil prices lifted risk sentiment in holiday-thinned trading.
summary_public: Japan’s Nikkei 225 breached 65,000 for the first time Monday as a sharp decline in oil prices lifted risk sentiment in holiday-thinned trading.
